member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.ArrowIcon
member.summary: ArrowIcon class.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.ArrowIcon.ScrollButtonColorProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.ArrowIcon.ScrollButtonBackgroundProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.ArrowIcon.ScrollButtonColor
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that can be used to customize the scroll button’s color in SfTabView.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.ArrowIcon.ScrollButtonBackground
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that can be used to customize the scroll button’s background color in SfTabView.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.ArrowIcon.ButtonArrowType
member.summary: Gets or sets the arrow type of the scroll buttons.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.ArrowIcon.EnableLiquidGlassEffect
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the Liquid Glass effect should be enabled for this arrow icon.

member.name: E:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.ArrowIcon.ScrollButtonClicked
member.summary: Scroll button clicked event.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.ArrowIcon.OnDraw(Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.ICanvas,Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.RectF)
member.summary: This method is used to draw the forward and backward arrows.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.ArrowIcon.RaiseScrollButtonClickedEvent(System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Invokes event.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.ArrowIcon.OnTouch(Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.PointerEventArgs)
member.summary: Handles touch events to determine if a scroll button is clicked.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfHorizontalContent
member.summary: Represents the SfHorizontalStackLayout class.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfHorizontalContent.ItemsProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfHorizontalContent.SelectedIndexProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfHorizontalContent.ContentItemTemplateProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfHorizontalContent.ItemsSourceProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfHorizontalContent.ContentTransitionDurationProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfHorizontalContent.EnableVirtualizationProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfHorizontalContent.#ctor(Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView,Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: E:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfHorizontalContent.SelectionChanging
member.summary: Selection Changing event.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfHorizontalContent.ContentTransitionDuration
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that can be used to modify the duration of content transition in Tab View.
member.value: It accepts the double values and the default value is 100.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfHorizontalContent.Items
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that defines the collection of items.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfHorizontalContent.SelectedIndex
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that defines the selected index.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfHorizontalContent.ContentItemTemplate
member.summary: Gets or sets the ContentItemTemplate.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfHorizontalContent.ItemsSource
member.summary: Gets or sets the itemssource.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfHorizontalContent.ContentWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that defines the content width of each tab header item.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfHorizontalContent.IsTowardsRight
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the tab content moves toward the right or left.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfHorizontalContent.EnableVirtualization
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether lazy loading is enabled during the initial load.
member.value: It accepts the bool values and the default value is false.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfHorizontalContent.MeasureContent(System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Measure Override method

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfHorizontalContent.RaiseSelectionChangingEvent(Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SelectionChangingEventArgs)
member.summary: Invokes event.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfHorizontalContent.OnTouch(Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.PointerEventArgs)
member.summary: This method used for handle the touch.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfHorizontalContent.OnTap(Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.TapEventArgs)
member.summary: This method used for handle the tap.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfHorizontalContent.OnHandleTouchInteraction(Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.PointerActions,Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Point)
member.summary: This method used for handle the touch.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfHorizontalContent.InitializeTouchData(Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Point)
member.summary: Initializes touch data based on the provided pointer event arguments.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfHorizontalContent.HandleTouchMovement(Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Point)
member.summary: This method is used to handle the touch movement.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfHorizontalContent.TranslateXPosition(System.Double)
member.summary: This method is used to update the horizontal transition (X position) of the horizontal stack layout.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfHorizontalContent.CompletedTabSwipe
member.summary: This method is used to update the tab item position after swipe complete.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfHorizontalContent.MoveToNextTabItem
member.summary: This method is used to update the swipe towards the right.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfHorizontalContent.MoveToPreviousTabItem
member.summary: This method is used to update the swipe towards the left.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfHorizontalContent.MoveToCurrentTabItem
member.summary: This method is used to update the current position.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfHorizontalContent.FindVelocity(Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Point)
member.summary: Methods to find the velocity of swiping.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfHorizontalContent.RaiseSelectionChanging
member.summary: Raises the event to notify that the tab selection is changing when navigating between tab contents by swiping.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfHorizontalContent.GetNextItemIndex
member.summary: This method is used to get an index of next item from the selected index.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfHorizontalContent.GetNextVisibleItemIndex
member.summary: This method is used to get an index of next visibile item from the selected index.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfHorizontalContent.UpdateItemVisibility
member.summary: This method is used to check the visibility of nearby items of the selected item.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfHorizontalContent.LoadItemsContent(System.Int32)
member.summary: This method is used to replace the placeholder view with a tab item when the EnableVirtualization is true.
member.param: This index position of the child in the HorizontalStackLayout to replaced with a tab item.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfHorizontalContent.Syncfusion#Maui#Core#Internals#ITouchListener#OnTouch(Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.PointerEventArgs)
member.summary: This method triggers on any touch interaction on .

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfHorizontalContent.OnHandlerChanging(Microsoft.Maui.Controls.HandlerChangingEventArgs)
member.summary: Raises on handler changing.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: E:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.SelectionChanged
member.summary: Selection Changed event.

member.name: E:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.TabItemTapped
member.summary: Tab item tapped event.

member.name: E:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.SelectionChanging
member.summary: Selection Changing event.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.IndicatorPlacement
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that defines the indicator placement.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.HeaderHorizontalTextAlignment
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that can be used to customize the horizontal text alignment in tab header.
member.value: It accepts the values, and the default value is .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.IndicatorWidthMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that can be used to customize the indicator width in the tab header.
member.value: It accepts indicatorWidthMode values and the default value is IndicatorWidthMode.Fit.
member.remark: It's not applicable when the IndicatorPlacement is Fill.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.TabWidthMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that defines tab width mode.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.TabHeaderPadding
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that can be used to customize the padding of the tab header.
member.remarks: Note: TabHeaderPadding is only applied to the SizeToContent type of TabWidthMode.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.IndicatorBackground
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that defines the background color of the indicator.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.Items
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that defines the collection of items.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.SelectedIndex
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that defines the selected index.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.IsScrollButtonEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to enable the scroll buttons.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.ItemsSource
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that defines the collection of items source.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.HeaderItemTemplate
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that defines the header item template.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.IndicatorCornerRadius
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that can be used to customize the corner radius of selection indicator.
member.value: It accepts the values and the default value is -1.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.HeaderDisplayMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the display mode for the tab header, determining whether to show the image and text.
member.value: It accepts the TabHeaderDisplayMode values, and the default value is TabHeaderDisplayMode.Default.
member.remarks: When the HeaderDisplayMode is set to TabHeaderDisplayMode.Default, the image and text will be displayed on the tab bar based on the Header and ImageSource properties of the tab item.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.ContentTransitionDuration
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that can be used to modify the duration of content transition in Tab View.
member.value: It accepts the double values and the default value is 100.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.IndicatorStrokeThickness
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that can be used to customize the indicator’s border height.
member.value: It accepts the double values and the default value is 3.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.FontAutoScalingEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that Determines whether or not the font of the control should scale automatically according to the operating system settings.
member.value: It accepts Boolean values, and the default value is false.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.ScrollButtonBackground
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that can be used to customize the scroll button’s background color in SfTabView.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.ScrollButtonColor
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that can be used to customize the scroll button’s color in SfTabView.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.ScrollButtonDisabledIconColor
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that can be used to customize the scroll button’s disabled foreground color in SfTabView.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.EnableRippleAnimation
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the animation is enabled or not when tab is selected in SfTabView.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.HoverBackground
member.summary: Gets or sets the hover color for the tab items. The default color is Color.FromRgba("#1C1B1F").

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.EnableLiquidGlassEffect
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the Liquid Glass effect should be enabled for this tab bar.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.GetEffectsView(Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem)
member.summary: To get the effects view for the tab item.

member.summary: TapEvent

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.OnTap(System.Object,Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.TapEventArgs)
member.summary: TapEvent

member.summary: Invokes event.

member.summary: Invokes event.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.RaiseSelectionChangingEvent(Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SelectionChangingEventArgs)
member.summary: Invokes event.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.UpdateTabIndicatorPosition(System.Double)
member.summary: To update the position of the tab indicator.

member.summary: To update the corner radius for selection indicator.

member.summary: To update the border height for selection indicator.

member.summary: To update the indicator placement.

member.summary: To clear the tab header item.

member.summary: To update the selected index.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.UpdateFontAutoScalingEnabled(System.Boolean)
member.summary: To update the FontAutoScalingEnabled for Items.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.UpdateScrollButtonEnabled(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Updates the tab header parent container based on the specified value of IsScrollButtonEnabled.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.UpdateSelectedTabItemIsSelected(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: To update the IsSelected for the selected tab item.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.UpdateItems
member.summary: Method used to update the items.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.UpdateHeaderItemHeight
member.summary: Method used to update the height of the tab header item.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.AddTabItemProperties(Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem,System.Int32)
member.summary: To add the tab item properties.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.AddHeaderItems(Microsoft.Maui.Controls.View,System.Int32)
member.summary: To add the tab header items.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.MeasureHeaderContentWidth(Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem)
member.summary: This method is used to measure the header content width.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.CalculateTabItemWidth
member.summary: Method used to calculate the tab item width.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.UpdateScrollViewPosition(System.Int32)
member.summary: To update the scroll view position.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.MeasureOverride(System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Measure Override method

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.UpdateEnableLiquidGlassEffect(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Enables or disables the liquid glass visual effect for the tab bar.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.UpdateScrollButtonBackground
member.summary: Updates the background color of the scroll buttons.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.UpdateScrollButtonColor
member.summary: Updates the color of the scroll buttons.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.UpdateHeaderDisplayMode
member.summary: Update the HeaderDisplayMode value for each SfTabitem.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.AddTouchEffects(Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.Helper.SfGrid)
member.summary: Add the effects layout to the grid.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.UpdateTabIndicatorTemplateWidth
member.summary: Update tabindicator width based on template.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.CalculateTabHeaderImageSize(System.Double)
member.summary: Calculates the tab header image size based on the item's ImageSize.
member.param: The ImageSize of the tab item.
member.returns: The calculated tab header image size.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.UpdateTabIndicatorWidth
member.summary: Update indicator width based on items.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.UpdateIndicatorPosition(System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Updates the position of the tab indicator based on the selected tab's X position and width.
member.param: The X position of the selected tab item.
The width of the tab indicator.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.IndicatorAnimation
member.summary: Method to animate the selection indicator in Tab View.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.ShouldPerformAction
member.summary: Determines whether an action should be performed based on the change in selected index, running animations, indicator dimensions, and the position of the selected view.
member.returns: Returns true if the conditions for performing the action are met; otherwise, returns false.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.UpdateFillSelectedTabItem
member.summary: This method is used to update the fill for the selected tab item.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.SecondWidthAnimatedMethod(System.Double)
member.summary: This is update the tabselection indicator width

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.FirstWidthAnimatedMethod(System.Double)
member.summary: This is update the tabselection indicator width

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.TranslateAnimatedMethod(System.Double)
member.summary: This is update the tabselection indicator x position.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.UpdateIndicatorWidthMode
member.summary: This method once the tabwidth mode property is changed.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabBar.UpdateFlowDirection
member.summary: This method triggered once the flow direction property is changed.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem
member.summary: Represents a selectable item inside a TabView.

member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem.ImageSourceProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem.ImagePositionProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem.BadgeTextProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem.BadgeSettingsProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem.FontAutoScalingEnabledProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem.HeaderDisplayModeProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem.TabWidthModeProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem.IndicatorPlacementProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem.ImageSizeProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem.HeaderHorizontalTextAlignmentProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem.EnableLiquidGlassEffectProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: E:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem.Touched
member.summary: Touched event.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem.Header
member.summary: Gets or sets the text for the tab header.
member.value: Specifies the header text of the tab item. The default value is an empty string.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem.FontFamily
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that defines the font family of the header.
member.value: Specifies the font family of the tab item's header text. The default value is null.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem.FontAttributes
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that defines the font attributes of the tab header.
member.value: One of the enumeration that specifies the font attributes of the tab item's header text. The default mode is .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem.FontSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that defines the font size of the tab header.
member.value: Specifies the font size of the tab item's header text. The default value is 14d.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem.TextColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that defines the text color of the tab header.
member.value: Specifies the color of the tab item's header text. The default value is black.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem.ImageSource
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that defines the header image of the tab header.
member.value: Specifies the image of the tab item. The default value is null.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem.ImagePosition
member.summary: Gets or sets how the image aligns relative to the text.
member.value: One of the enumeration that specifies the image position relative to the text. The default mode is .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem.BadgeText
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that defines the badge text of the tab item.
member.value: Specifies the badge text of the tab item. The default value is an empty string.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem.BadgeSettings
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that defines the badge settings of the tab item's badge text.
member.value: Specifies the badge setting of the tab item's badge text. The default value is null.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem.ImageTextSpacing
member.summary: Gets or sets the spacing between header and image
member.value: Specifies the spacing between the header and image. The default spacing value is 10d.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem.IsSelected
member.summary: Gets whether the tab item is selected or not.
member.value: Returns whether the tabitem is selected or not.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem.ImageSize
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that can be used to customize the image size in tab header.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem.IsDescriptionNotSetByUser
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the SemanticProperties.Description is set or not by user.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem.HeaderDisplayMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that defines the header display mode.
member.value: One of the enumeration that specifies the header display mode of the respective tab item. The default mode is .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem.TabWidthMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that defines the tab width mode.
member.value: One of the enumeration that specifies the tab width mode of the tab bar. The default mode is .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem.IndicatorPlacement
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that defines the tab indicator placement.
member.value: One of the enumeration that specifies the tab width mode of the tab bar. The default mode is .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem.HeaderHorizontalTextAlignment
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that can be used to customize the horizontal text alignment in tab header.
member.value: It accepts the values, and the default value is .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem.EnableLiquidGlassEffect
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the liquid glass effect is enabled for this tab item header.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem.Font
member.summary: Gets the font of the tab item.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem.IsMouseMoved
member.summary: Gets or sets while the mouse is moved or not over the tab item.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem.OnTouch(Syncfusion.Maui.Core.Internals.PointerEventArgs)
member.summary: Touch event.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem.ChangeSelectedState
member.summary: Method used to change the selected state.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem.MeasureOverride(System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: MeasureOverride method.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem.OnFontFamilyChanged(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Property changed method for font.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem.OnFontSizeChanged(System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Property changed method for font size.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem.Syncfusion#Maui#Graphics#Internals#ITextElement#OnFontAutoScalingEnabledChanged(System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Invoked when the changed.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem.FontSizeDefaultValueCreator
member.summary: Returns the default font value.
member.returns: Method returns the default font size value.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem.OnFontAttributesChanged(Microsoft.Maui.Controls.FontAttributes,Microsoft.Maui.Controls.FontAttributes)
member.summary: Method used to change the font attributes

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabItem.OnFontChanged(Microsoft.Maui.Font,Microsoft.Maui.Font)
member.summary: Property changed method for font.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView
member.summary: Represents the control that contains multiple items that share the same space on the screen.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.TabBarBackgroundProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.HeaderDisplayModeProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.TabBarPlacementProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.IndicatorPlacementProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.IndicatorWidthModeProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.TabWidthModeProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.IndicatorBackgroundProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.TabBarHeightProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.ItemsProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.SelectedIndexProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.ItemsSourceProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.HeaderItemTemplateProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.ContentItemTemplateProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.TabHeaderPaddingProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.IsScrollButtonEnabledProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.HeaderHorizontalTextAlignmentProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.ContentTransitionDurationProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.IndicatorCornerRadiusProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.IndicatorStrokeThicknessProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.FontAutoScalingEnabledProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.EnableLiquidGlassEffectProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.EnableSwipingProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.ScrollButtonBackgroundProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.ScrollButtonColorProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.EnableVirtualizationProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.EnableRippleAnimationProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.TabBarBorderThicknessProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.ShowTabBarBorderProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.TabBarCornerRadiusProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.ScrollButtonDisabledIconColorProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.HoverBackgroundProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: E:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.SelectionChanged
member.summary: Occurs when the current selection is changed.

member.name: E:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.TabItemTapped
member.summary: Occurs when the header of the tab item is tapped.

member.name: E:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.SelectionChanging
member.summary: Occurs when the selection is changing in SfTabView.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.EnableLiquidGlassEffect
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the liquid glass effect is enabled for the view.
member.value: It accepts bool values, and the default value is False.
member.remarks: This effect is supported only on macOS and iOS platforms.

example.code: <tabView:SfTabView EnableLiquidGlassEffect="{OnPlatform iOS=true, MacCatalyst=true, Default=false}"> <!-- Tab items here --> </tabView:SfTabView>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.IndicatorWidthMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that can be used to customize the indicator width in the tab header.
member.value: It accepts indicatorWidthMode values and the default value is IndicatorWidthMode.Fit.
member.remark: It's not applicable when the IndicatorPlacement is Fill.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.HeaderDisplayMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the display mode for the tab header, determining whether to show the image and text.
member.value: It accepts the TabHeaderDisplayMode values, and the default value is TabHeaderDisplayMode.Default.
member.remarks: When the HeaderDisplayMode is set to TabHeaderDisplayMode.Default, the image and text will be displayed on the tab bar based on the Header and ImageSource properties of the tab item.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.TabBarBackground
member.summary: Gets or sets a brush that describes the tab header's background.
member.value: Specifies the background of the tab bar. The default value is null.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.TabBarPlacement
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the tab header should be at the bottom or at the top of the tab content.
member.value: One of the enumeration that specifies the placement of the tab bar. The default mode is .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.IndicatorPlacement
member.summary: Gets or sets the placement of the selection indication.
member.value: One of the enumeration that specifies the placement of the selection indicator. The default mode is .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.TabWidthMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the method for determining the width of each tab.
member.value: One of the enumeration that specifies the tab item's width. The default mode is .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.IndicatorBackground
member.summary: Gets or sets a brush that describes the selection indicator's background.
member.value: Specifies the background of the selection indicator. The default value is SolidColorBrush(Color.FromArgb("#6200EE"))".

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.TabBarHeight
member.summary: Gets or sets the height of the tab header.
member.value: Specifies the height of the tab header. The default value is 48d.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.Items
member.summary: Gets or sets the collection used to populate the content of the Tab View.
member.value: The collection used to populate the content of the Tab View. The default is an empty collection.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.HeaderHorizontalTextAlignment
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that can be used to customize the horizontal text alignment in tab header.
member.value: It accepts the values, and the default value is .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.SelectedIndex
member.summary: Gets or sets the index specifying the currently selected item.
member.value: A zero-based index of the currently selected item.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.ItemsSource
member.summary: Gets or sets the collection used to populate the content of the Tab View.
member.value: The collection used to populate the content of the Tab View. The default is an empty collection.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.HeaderItemTemplate
member.summary: Gets or sets the template that is used to display the header.
member.value: A DataTemplate object that is used to display the header. The default is null.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.ContentItemTemplate
member.summary: Gets or sets the template that is used to display the content.
member.value: A DataTemplate object that is used to display the content. The default is null.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.TabHeaderPadding
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that can be used to customize the padding of the tab header.
member.remarks: Note: TabHeaderPadding is only applied to the SizeToContent type of TabWidthMode.
member.value: Specifies the padding of the tab header. The default value is new Thickness(52,0,52,0).

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.FontAutoScalingEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that Determines whether or not the font of the control should scale automatically according to the operating system settings.
member.value: It accepts Boolean values, and the default value is false.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.IndicatorCornerRadius
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that can be used to customize the corner radius of selection indicator.
member.value: It accepts the values and the default value is -1.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.IndicatorStrokeThickness
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that can be used to customize the indicator’s border height.
member.value: It accepts the double values and the default value is 3.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.IsScrollButtonEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to enable the scroll buttons.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.EnableSwiping
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether swiping is enabled in SfTabView.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.ContentTransitionDuration
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that can be used to modify the duration of content transition in Tab View.
member.value: It accepts the double values and the default value is 100.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.ScrollButtonBackground
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that can be used to customize the scroll button’s background color in SfTabView.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.ScrollButtonColor
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that can be used to customize the scroll button’s color in SfTabView.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.EnableVirtualization
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether lazy loading is enabled during the initial load.
member.value: A boolean value indicating whether lazy loading is enabled. The default value is false.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.EnableRippleAnimation
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether ripple animation should be enabled on the Tab View.
member.value: It accepts the Boolean values, and the default value is true.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.TabBarBorderThickness
member.summary: Gets or sets the thickness of the border around the TabBar in SfTabView.
member.value: A that specifies the border width for each side of the TabBar. The default value is new Thickness(0), which results in no visible border.
member.remarks: The border is rendered only when the thickness is greater than zero. You can specify a uniform thickness (e.g., "2") or per-side values (e.g., "1,2,1,2") in XAML.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.ShowTabBarBorder
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the TabBar border is visible.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.TabBarCornerRadius
member.summary: Gets or sets the corner radius of the TabBar border in SfTabView.
member.value: A that specifies the radius of the TabBar border's corners. The default value is new CornerRadius(0).
member.remarks: The border is visible only when is greater than zero. In XAML, you can specify a uniform radius (e.g., "10") or per-corner values (e.g., "10,0,10,0") in the order: TopLeft, TopRight, BottomLeft, BottomRight. You can also customize the color using .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.HoverBackground
member.summary: Gets or sets the hover color for the tab items. The default color is Color.FromRgba("#1C1B1F").

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.OnPropertyChanged(System.String)
member.summary: OnPropertyChanged method

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.RaiseSelectionChangedEvent(Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabSelectionChangedEventArgs)
member.summary: Invokes event.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.RaiseTabItemTappedEvent(Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabItemTappedEventArgs)
member.summary: Invokes event.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.RaiseSelectionChangingEvent(Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SelectionChangingEventArgs)
member.summary: Invokes event.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.TabBarBorderColorChanged(Microsoft.Maui.Controls.BindableObject,System.Object,System.Object)
member.summary: This method is called when the TabBarBorderColor property value changes. It updates the border color for the TabBar.
member.param: The bindable object whose TabBarBorderColor property has changed.
The old value of the TabBarBorderColor property.
The new value of the TabBarBorderColor property.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.TabBarBorderThicknessChanged(Microsoft.Maui.Controls.BindableObject,System.Object,System.Object)
member.summary: This method is called when the TabBarBorderThickness property value changes. It updates the border thickness for the TabBar.
member.param: The bindable object whose TabBarBorderThickness property has changed.
The old value of the TabBarBorderThickness property.
The new value of the TabBarBorderThickness property.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.ShowTabBarBorderChanged(Microsoft.Maui.Controls.BindableObject,System.Object,System.Object)
member.summary: This method is called when the ShowTabBarBorder property value changes. It updates the visibility of the TabBar border.
member.param: The bindable object whose ShowTabBarBorder property has changed.
The old value of the ShowTabBarBorder property.
The new value of the ShowTabBarBorder property.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.TabBarCornerRadiusChanged(Microsoft.Maui.Controls.BindableObject,System.Object,System.Object)
member.summary: This method is called when the TabBarCornerRadius property value changes. It updates the visibility of the TabBar border.
member.param: The bindable object whose TabBarCornerRadius property has changed.
The old value of the TabBarCornerRadius property.
The new value of the TabBarCornerRadius property.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.TabContentContainer_SeletionChanging(System.Object,Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SelectionChangingEventArgs)
member.summary: This method is triggered when the selection of tab contents is about to change.
member.param: Event data containing information about the selection changing.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.UpdateIndicatorWidthMode(Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.IndicatorWidthMode)
member.summary: Update the indicator width when the indicator width mode property is changed.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.UpdateHeaderDisplayMode(Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabBarDisplayMode)
member.summary: update the HeaderDisplayMode when the HeaderDisplayMode porperty is changed

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.Syncfusion#Maui#Themes#IParentThemeElement#GetThemeDictionary
member.summary: Returns SfTabViewStyles class for assigning keys

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.Syncfusion#Maui#Themes#IThemeElement#OnControlThemeChanged(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: This method will be called when a theme dictionary that contains the value for your control key is merged in application.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.Syncfusion#Maui#Themes#IThemeElement#OnCommonThemeChanged(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: This method will be called when users merge a theme dictionary that contains value for “SyncfusionTheme” dynamic resource key.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.OnScrollButtonBackgroundPropertyChanged(Microsoft.Maui.Controls.BindableObject,System.Object,System.Object)
member.summary: This method is called when the ScrollButtonBackground property value changes.It updates the ScrollButtonBackground of the tabHeaderContainer accordingly.
member.param: The bindable object whose ScrollButtonBackground property has changed.
The old value of the ScrollButtonBackground property.
The new value of the ScrollButtonBackground property.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SfTabView.OnScrollButtonColorChanged(Microsoft.Maui.Controls.BindableObject,System.Object,System.Object)
member.summary: This method is called when the ScrollButtonColor property value changes.It updates the ScrollButtonColor of the tabHeaderContainer accordingly.
member.param: The bindable object whose ScrollButtonColor property has changed.
The old value of the ScrollButtonColor property.
The new value of the ScrollButtonColor property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabBarBorder.TabBarBorderColorProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabBarBorder.TabBarBorderThicknessProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabBarBorder.ShowTabBarBorderProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabBarBorder.TabBarCornerRadiusProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabBarBorder.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabBarBorder.TabBarBorderColor
member.summary: Gets or sets a color that can be used to customize the border color.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabBarBorder.TabBarBorderThickness
member.summary: Gets or sets the thickness of the border with individual values for each side.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabBarBorder.ShowTabBarBorder
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the border is visible.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabBarBorder.TabBarCornerRadius
member.summary: Gets or sets the corner radius of the border.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabBarBorder.OnDraw(Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.ICanvas,Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.RectF)
member.summary: Draws the border when requested
member.param: The rectangle that needs to be redrawn

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabBarBorder.DrawFlatBorders(Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.ICanvas,Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.RectF,Microsoft.Maui.Thickness)
member.summary: Draws border lines around the TabBar
member.param: The rectangle defining the TabBar boundaries
The rectangle defining the TabBar boundaries

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabBarPlacement
member.summary: Describes the possible values for the position of header layout in SfTabView control.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabBarPlacement.Bottom
member.summary: Specifies the location below the content region of SfTabView control.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabBarPlacement.Top
member.summary: Specifies the location above the content region of SfTabView control.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabWidthMode
member.summary: Describes the possible values for tab width mode.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabWidthMode.Default
member.summary: Specifies that all tab header widths share the available header space.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabWidthMode.SizeToContent
member.summary: Specifies that the tab header width will be set based on the text size and image of each tab.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabIndicatorPlacement
member.summary: Describes the possible values for selection indicator placement.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabIndicatorPlacement.Bottom
member.summary: Specifies the location below the content region of the tab item header.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabIndicatorPlacement.Fill
member.summary: Specifies the full content region of the tab item header.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabIndicatorPlacement.Top
member.summary: Specifies the location above the content region of the tab item header.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabImagePosition
member.summary: Describes the possible values for the tab items’ image position in the header layout.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabImagePosition.Bottom
member.summary: Specifies the location below the tab items’ header.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabImagePosition.Left
member.summary: Specifies the location left to the tab items’ header.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabImagePosition.Right
member.summary: Specifies the location right to the tab items’ header.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabImagePosition.Top
member.summary: Specifies the location above the tab items’ header.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabBarDisplayMode
member.summary: Describes the possible values for the display types in the header layout.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabBarDisplayMode.Image
member.summary: Specifies the image type for header.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabBarDisplayMode.Text
member.summary: Specifies the text type for header.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabBarDisplayMode.Default
member.summary: Specifies both image and text type for header.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.IndicatorWidthMode
member.summary: Describes the possible values for tab indicator width.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.IndicatorWidthMode.Fit
member.summary: Specifies that the selection indicator width will be set based on the header’s content width of the tab view.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.IndicatorWidthMode.Stretch
member.summary: Specifies that the selection indicator width will be set based on the header width value of the tab view.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.ArrowType
member.summary: Specifies the direction of arrows used, either backward or forward.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SelectionChangingEventArgs
member.summary: This class serves as an event data for the event.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.SelectionChangingEventArgs.Index
member.summary: Gets the index value of the item that is about to be selected.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabItemCollection
member.summary: It represents a collection which holds the children for tab view control using the collection of SfTabItem.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabItemTappedEventArgs
member.summary: This class serves as an event data for the event.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabItemTappedEventArgs.TabItem
member.summary: Gets the selected tab item.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabItemTappedEventArgs.Cancel
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the event should be canceled.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabSelectionChangedEventArgs
member.summary: This class serves as an event data for the event.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabSelectionChangedEventArgs.OldIndex
member.summary: Gets the index of previously selected tab item.
member.Value: Returns the index of previously selected tab item.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabSelectionChangedEventArgs.NewIndex
member.summary: Gets the index of currently selected tab item.
member.Value: Returns the index of currently selected tab item.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabSelectionChangedEventArgs.Handled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the SelectionChanged event is handled.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabViewMaterialVisualStyle
member.summary: TabViewMaterialVisualStyle class.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabViewMaterialVisualStyle.HeaderDisplayModeProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabViewMaterialVisualStyle.ImagePositionProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabViewMaterialVisualStyle.BadgeSettingsProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabViewMaterialVisualStyle.BadgeTextProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabViewMaterialVisualStyle.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabViewMaterialVisualStyle.HeaderDisplayMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that defines the header display mode.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabViewMaterialVisualStyle.ImagePosition
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that defines the image position.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabViewMaterialVisualStyle.BadgeSettings
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that defines the badge settings of each tab item's badge text.
member.value: Specifies the badge setting of the respective tab item's badge text. The default value is null.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabViewMaterialVisualStyle.BadgeText
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that defines the badge text of each tab item.
member.value: Specifies the badge text of the respective tab item. The default value is an empty string.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.TabView.TabViewMaterialVisualStyle.OnParentSet
member.summary: Invoked whenever the Parent of an element is set.

member.summary: Initializing SfTabViewStyles class
